claim: LLMs natively can only generate text, images, or videos—they cannot take actions like booking flights or querying databases without external tools
actionable: Always provide AI agents with explicit tool definitions when you need them to perform actions beyond text generation
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!

claim: AI agents combine LLMs with memory and tool access, enabling them to gather information, make decisions, and take actions iteratively until goals are met
actionable: Design agents by separating the LLM reasoning layer from tool integration—each tool should be independently callable
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!

claim: APIs provide structured interfaces for applications to communicate with each other, replacing the need for web scraping or complex parsing algorithms
actionable: When integrating AI agents with external services, prioritize official API endpoints over web scraping to ensure reliability and authorization support
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!

claim: MCP was introduced by Anthropic as a universal standard for AI agents to discover and interact with third-party platform capabilities
actionable: Use MCP instead of writing custom adapters for each API integration—it's the industry-standard protocol
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!

claim: MCP servers are configured in agent config files (e.g., claude/.mcp.json for Claude) specifying the server name, command, and required arguments
actionable: Store MCP server credentials in environment variables and reference them in config files rather than hardcoding secrets
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!

claim: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol enables one agent to discover capabilities in another agent and delegate tasks, supporting dynamic multi-agent collaboration
actionable: Design multi-agent systems where specialized agents handle specific domains and delegate to other agents via A2A protocol
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!

claim: Cursor and VS Code with GitHub Copilot are real-world agent examples that perform iterative tasks (code generation, testing, terminal execution) without stopping until complete
actionable: Use GitHub Copilot's agent mode instead of single-turn completions for complex coding tasks requiring iteration
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Explained for Beginners: AI Flight Booking Demo!
